name: Project Asteroids
short_description: In the vastness of space, you are a lone robot desperately trying to survive. Build, explore, and fight for your life as you face deadly threats in the asteroid belt. This hardcore game shows no mercy—dangers lurk at every step, ready to destroy you at any moment.
detailed_description:
Project Asteroids — Online survival game with a focus on PVP

WARNING: This is a hardcore game. You will be killed everywhere and constantly.
Dangers lurk at every turn, and only the strongest will survive.

I have no feelings. I have no fear.
I must work. And I’m working.
My modules are outdated, but as long as they exist, I am useful.
My body is rusted, but as long as I can move, I am useful.
I don’t know where I am, but it doesn’t matter. I know my goal.

To survive.

On an asteroid in one of hundreds of thousands of newly created star systems, use everything that will help you survive:

  • Explore every corner of this strange universe.

  • Collect resources, exchange them, or shop at station markets.

Build bases in open space:

  • Equip them and unlock new crafting recipes.

  • Upgrade or replace base modules and devices.

Team up with friends or fight other players for:

  • Rare resources,

  • A place under the light of a dying star.

supported_languages:
English*, Russian, Spanish - Spain, Korean, Spanish - Latin America, French, German, Simplified Chinese, Turkish, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
